mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotel ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM hotel WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel (id, name, description, address, city, star_rating, contact_phone, facilities, cover_image, images, min_price, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{address}, #{city}, #{starRating}, #{contactPhone}, #{facilities}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{minPrice}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE hotel SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE hotel SET id = id - 1 WHERE id > #{afterId}
UPDATE hotel SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hotel SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
